texto: I'm serious, Mar, I don't know how to act around him now. I can't be nice, because he'll hate that. But I can't be mean just to be nice.""You really need medication.""I'm in a quandary. A Catch-22. I'm screwed.
explicacao: Citação de Kristin Walker sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I'm serious, Mar, I don't know how to act around him now. I can't be nice, because he'll hate tha…” articula reflexao, ya, yalit em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como yalit e young-adult.

texto: And I’m sorry,” Big Earrings said, “But how is some course going to teach them how marriage works? I’ve been married three times, and I haven’t figured it out yet.” She snorted. “I figured out how to call a lawyer, though.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kristin Walker que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “And I’m sorry,” Big Earrings said, “But how is some course going to teach them how marriage works…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, marriage, figured, com foco em casamento e trabalho.

texto: I'm telling you, you really should stick to mating within your species, whatever that is.''I would,' I said, 'but unfortunately, there are no gorgeous, all-powerful, all-knowing gods around here. I'd even settle for a demigod. It's a step down, I know. But alas, there are nothing but low-brained mortals here. And half-brains, like you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kristin Walker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I'm telling you, you really should stick to mating within your species, whatever that is.''I woul…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, gods, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e humor.
